au.levelLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
au.updateNote: Still current at:12 July 2026 Updated:04 June 2026 Latest update:We continue to advise exercise a high degree of caution in Algeria overall. Higher levels apply in some areas. Do not travel to the areas that border Mali, Niger, Mauritania, Libya and Tunisia due to the high threat of terrorism and kidnapping. You must get a visa in advance of arrival to enter Algeria.
